mapper.select: /* getDcDealStatement */ select concat(SUBSTR(BH.BLHYYMM,1,4),'년 ',SUBSTR(BH.BLHYYMM,5,2),'월 ', MP.PTNAMLC,'(',MW.WHNAMLC,')') as BLTITLE , CONCAT(SUBSTR(BH.BLSDATE,1,4),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BLSDATE,5,2),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BLSDATE,7,2)) as BLSDATE , CONCAT(SUBSTR(BH.BLEDATE,1,4),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BLEDATE,5,2),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BLEDATE,7,2)) as BLEDATE , MW.WHNAMLC AS WAREKEY , CASE WHEN BI.BLRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BLRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BLRTKNM ELSE (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.BLRCSGB and COMCDKY = 'BLRCSGB') END AS BLRCSGB , CASE WHEN DM.DOCCTNM IS NULL THEN (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.BLRTKGB and COMCDKY = 'BLRTKGB') ELSE CONCAT(DM.DOCCTNM,'(',(select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.BLRTKGB and COMCDKY = 'BLRTKGB'),')') END AS BLRTKGB , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.BLRUNIT and COMCDKY = 'BLRUNIT') as BLRUNIT , BI.REFCQTY , BI.BLRCOST , BI.BLRAMOT , BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100) as BLRAMTX , (BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100))+BI.BLRAMOT as BLRSUMY , BI.BLRREMK , ROW_NUMBER() over(order by BLRCSGB) as ROWNUM FROM BLGTHD BH inner join BLGTIT BI on BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY and BH.BLHDCKY = BI.BLHDCKY inner join MWARMA MW on BH.COMPKEY = MW.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = MW.WAREKEY inner join MPTNMA MP on BH.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY and BI.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY left join MDOCMA DM on BH.COMPKEY = DM.COMPKEY and BI.WAREKEY = DM.WAREKEY and BI.DOCCATE = DM.DOCCATE and BI.DOCTYPE = DM.DOCTYPE where BH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and BH.BLHDCKY = #{blhdcky} and BI.BLITYPE = 'SUM' and BI.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and BI.PTNRKEY = #{ptnrkey} and BI.BLRPMGB = #{blrpmgb} order by BH.COMPKEY, BLRCSGB

/* getTcDealStatement */ select concat(SUBSTR(BH.BTHYYMM,1,4),'년 ',SUBSTR(BH.BTHYYMM,5,2),'월 ', MP.PTNAMLC,'(',MW.WHNAMLC,')') as BTTITLE , concat(SUBSTR(BH.BTSDATE,1,4),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BTSDATE,5,2),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BTSDATE,7,2)) as BTSDATE , concat(SUBSTR(BH.BTEDATE,1,4),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BTEDATE,5,2),'.',SUBSTR(BH.BTEDATE,7,2)) as BTEDATE , MW.WHNAMLC as WAREKEY , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.MDESTKY and COMCDKY = 'MDESTKY') as MDESTKY /* 공장(대표도착지) */ , TM.VHCFNAM , TM.OWNERNM , CASE WHEN BI.BTRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BTRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BTRTKNM WHEN BI.DOCTYPE = '829' THEN CONCAT( (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) ,'(' , (SELECT SHTRTNM FROM TSHRHD WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND SHTRTKY = BI.SHTRTKY) ,')') ELSE (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB and COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) END AS BTRCSGB , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.BTRUNIT and COMCDKY = 'BTRUNIT') as BTRUNIT , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and MC.COMCDVL = BI.BTRPMGB and COMCDKY = 'BTRPMGB') as BTRPMGB , BI.BTRCOST , BI.REFCQTY , BI.BTRAMOT , BI.BTRREMK /* 비고 */ from BTGTHD BH inner join BTGTIT BI on BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY and BH.BTHDCKY = BI.BTHDCKY inner join TVHCMA TM on BH.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY and BI.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY inner join MWARMA MW on BH.COMPKEY = MW.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = MW.WAREKEY inner join MPTNMA MP on BH.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY and BI.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY where BH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} and BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' and BI.PTNRKEY = #{ptnrkey} and BI.BTRPMGB = #{btrpmgb} order by BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BI.PTNRKEY, BI.BTRPMGB, BI.MDESTKY, BI.VEHICKY, BI.BTRCSGB

select TM.OWNERNM as USERNAM /* 차주 이름 */ , TP.USERACT /* 사용자 계정ID */ , TM.VHCFNAM /* 차주번호 */ , IFNULL(BH.BTRAMOT,0) as BTRAMOT /* 기본급 */ from TVHCMA TM left join ( select BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BI.VEHICKY, BI.BTRAMOT from BTGTHD BH inner join BTGTIT BI on BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY and BH.BTHDCKY = BH.BTHDCKY where BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} -- PARAM and BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} -- PARAM and BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} -- PARAM and BI.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} -- PARAM and BI.BTRPMGB = 'PAYMENT' -- 고정 and BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' -- 고정 and BI.BTRCSGB = 'DFTCT' -- 고정 ) BH on BH.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY and BH.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY left join TPVASS TP on BH.COMPKEY = TP.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY and BH.VEHICKY = TP.VEHICKY and TP.VHOWNYN = 'Y' where TM.COMPKEY = #{compkey} -- PARAM and TM.WAREKEY = #{warekey} -- PARAM and TM.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} -- PARAM

/* bmb09SubData1 */ select BI.SHTRTKY /* 셔틀노선 */ , TS.SHTRTNM /* 셔틀노선명 */ , SUM(BI.REFCQTY) as REFCQTY /* 운행횟수/연장시간 */ , MAX(BI.BTRCOST) as BTRCOST /* 단가(원) */ , SUM(BI.BTRAMOT) as BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ from BTGTHD BH inner join BTGTIT BI on BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY and BH.BTHDCKY = BH.BTHDCKY inner join TSHRHD TS on BH.COMPKEY = TS.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = TS.WAREKEY and BI.SHTRTKY = TS.SHTRTKY where BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} and BI.BTRPMGB = 'PAYMENT' and BI.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} and BI.BTITYPE = 'ROW' and (BI.DOCTYPE IN ('829')) group by BI.SHTRTKY, TS.SHTRTNM UNION ALL /* 검증에서 추가된 비용 */ SELECT '' as SHTRTKY , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM where COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and COMCDKY in ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB') and COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB) as SHTRTNM /* 계정명 */ , BI.REFCQTY as REFCQTY , BI.BTRCOST as BTRCOST /* 단가(원) */ , BI.BTRAMOT as BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ from BTGTHD BH inner join BTGTIT BI on BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY and BH.BTHDCKY = BH.BTHDCKY where BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} and BI.BTRPMGB = 'PAYMENT' and BI.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} and BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' and BI.BTRCSGB in ('EXTCT','ETC')

/* bmb09SubData2 */ /* 공제비 */ SELECT BI.BTRCSGB /* 계정 */ , (select COMCDTX from V_MCODEM where COMPKEY = BH.COMPKEY and COMCDKY = 'BTRFSGB' and COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB) as BTRCSNM /* 계정명 */ , SUM(BI.BTRAMOT) as BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ from BTGTHD BH inner join BTGTIT BI on BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY and BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY and BH.BTHDCKY = BH.BTHDCKY inner join BFTRMA BF on BH.COMPKEY = BF.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BF.WAREKEY AND BI.BFTCODE = BF.BFTCODE where BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} and BI.BTRPMGB = 'PAYMENT' and BI.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} and BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' and TRIM(BI.BFTCODE) != '' and BI.BTRCSGB != 'DFTCT' AND BF.BTDDTGB = 'Y' group by BI.BTRCSGB
select null as SHTRTNM, null as REFCQTY, null as BTRCOST, null as BTRAMOT from dual;
select null as BTRCSGB, null as BTRAMOT from dual;
